sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88560" key="prosanaku/ptw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσανα-κύπτω</orth>, <sense id="n88560.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be reinvigorated besides</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0643.tlg001:38:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.Lond.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
